description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a series of evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its top surface, creating a striped pattern. The grooves are deep and uniform, giving the block a visually striking, modern appearance. The block is solid and has a matte, slightly reflective finish, suggesting it is made from a dark, dense stone such as granite or basalt. The sides of the block are smooth and unadorned, contrasting with the textured top. The overall form is geometric and precise, with sharp edges and a substantial thickness. This type of block is often used in urban environments as a barrier or obstacle, providing both functional separation and aesthetic appeal.
description: A solid, rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on its top surface, creating a bold striped pattern. The block is dark, dense, and has a matte, slightly reflective finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the block and the parallel grooves running horizontally across the top surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the grooves and the block's substantial thickness, with grooves running away from the viewer.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the striped pattern and the block's solid, smooth sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the depth and regularity of the grooves along the top surface.
attribute_location_context: modern urban sidewalk or plaza as a barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: embedded in concrete or set on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No significant weathering is visible; the surface appears clean and well-maintained with no chips or erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
